title: Fullstack Software Engineer
description:
About SchoolAI

We make school awesome everyday for students and the people supporting them by finding out what they need and making it happen.

We believe in the power of working shoulder to shoulder with great people on important problems. This role is based out of our beautiful Lehi, Utah office 3 days per week (Monday, Thursday, Friday), with at home days twice per week.

Values

We Want Everyone At SchoolAI To Make a Competitive Wage, Have Fun, And Do Good. As We Build Out The Team, We Optimize For, And Invest In, Great People Who

🪄 Make Magic – Surprise and delight.
☀️ Rise to the Moment – Play big.
🚀 Find Leverage – Work hard and smart.
💪 Overwhelm Constraints – Every second counts.
🔗 Connect the Dots – Systems thinking and tight feedback loops.
➡️ Simplify and Go – Do the simplest thing that might work.
🐻 Run at the Bear – Do the hard thing.
🎉 Have Fun Winning Together – All for one.

We use our core values to make decisions, evaluate work, and win. We expect that every team member demonstrate these values. In turn, we'll invest in you and your impact at SchoolAI.

SchoolAI is searching for an exceptional Full Stack Software Engineer to join our team. We believe in working as cross functional teams to build delightful products. You'll work with a talented team of fullstack engineers, data engineers, platform engineers, product designers and product managers, to produce cutting edge software that's delightful to use. An ideal candidate understands software development best practices and isn't fooled into thinking that the outputs of what they build outweigh the outcomes of what they build. They'll work well with others and be excited about the opportunity to work at an early stage startup.

About The Role

Work with product management and product design roles to understand and empathize with customer needs
Build product prototypes to understand market viability and effectiveness
Work with product designers to build pixel perfect software that will delight customers
Work with AI engineers and Platform engineers to integrate and implement AI workflows and LLM's into real world production environments
Monitor the performance and adoption of what's built to ensure we are headed in the right direction
Help us attain absolute stability in our product by owning quality, comprehensive automated test creation, continuous delivery, and staged releases
Participate in seeking healthy development and collaboration practices as a team

We'd Love To Hear From You If You

Are an AI first engineer that is pushing the boundaries on AI driven development
Have 3+ years of full stack web development experience with React, Node.js and TypeScript
Are familiar with managing and evolving relational database schemas
Have experience owning quality and writing automated tests
Have a strong desire to work collaboratively, on your team and across teams
Are familiar with GCP, AWS, or an equivalent cloud platform
Have excellent communication skills, and are enthusiastic about collaborating on cross-functional teams

The Pay Range For This Role Is
107,000 - 185,000 USD per year (Lehi, Utah (HQ))

requirements.description: AI first engineer pushing the boundaries on AI driven development
3+ years of full stack web development experience with React, Node.js and TypeScript
Familiar with managing and evolving relational database schemas
Experience owning quality and writing automated tests
Strong desire to work collaboratively, on your team and across teams
Familiar with GCP, AWS, or an equivalent cloud platform
Excellent communication skills, enthusiastic about collaborating on cross-functional teams
Build pixel perfect software working with product designers
Integrate and implement AI workflows and LLMs into production environments
Experience with continuous delivery and staged releases
Build product prototypes to understand market viability
Software development best practices with outcome-oriented mindset
Early stage startup experience or excitement about working at one
